dailyNews.title: Iran’s missile power ‘significantly degraded’ and ‘combat ineffective’: US think tank ISW
dailyNews.description: A report from the Institute of the Study of War indicates that while Iran continues missile attacks, many of its ballistic missiles are combat ineffective. US-Israeli strikes have created fear within Iranian forces, leading to a decline in missile launches and recruitment challenges.

dailyNews.title: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor’s gunman, driver attacked in Malappuram, one held
dailyNews.description: Police officials said the incident took place when there was a roadblock at the Chelithode bridge as Tharoor was on his way to attend an election campaign event of Congress leader A P Anilkumar.

dailyNews.title: Astronaut Victor Glover praised for saying moon mission is 'human history,' not 'Black history'
dailyNews.description: Victor Glover said the Artemis II mission represents “human history," not identity-based milestones. His remarks gained traction online and drew praise from conservatives.

dailyNews.description: The NFL said Chiefs wide receiver Rashee Rice was cleared after an independent probe found insufficient evidence he violated the league’s personal conduct policy.

dailyNews.description: President Trump ordered the Department of Homeland Security to find a way to pay "each and every employee" of the agency.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 2027 budget asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending
dailyNews.description: President Trump's new budget proposal asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending — a 42% increase — while cutting nondefense spending by $73 billion, or 10%.

dailyNews.title: Trump said Iran was 'decimated.' Then an American F-15E fighter jet was shot down.
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Less than 48 hours after President Donald Trump told Americans the U.S. military had “beaten and completely decimated Iran,” Tehran shot down an F-15E fighter jet, setting off a high-risk scramble by U.S. forces to rescue two service members from deep inside Iranian territory.

dailyNews.title: Trump is considering more changes to his Cabinet in the coming weeks

dailyNews.description: The president signed a similar memo last week directing pay for TSA workers.

dailyNews.title: Firings in Trump 1.0 vs Trump 2.0

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
